title: jasminum magnificum
intro: Jasminum magnificum, also known as the night-blooming jasmine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. The plant is known for its fragrant flowers that bloom at night and release their scent to attract pollinators, such as moths and bats. Jasminum magnificum has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Jasminum magnificum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and digestive issues, and it can be prepared as a herbal tea, essential oil, or infused in water for consumption.
